lines.gurmukhi: ਅਗੈ ਜਾਤਿ ਨ ਪੁਛੀਐ ਕਰਣੀ ਸਬਦੁ ਹੈ ਸਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: agai jaat na puchheeai karanee sabad hai saar |
lines.english: Hereafter, no one is questioned about social status; excellent and sublime is the practice of the Word of the Shabad.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਇਆ ਓਹੁ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਹੈ ਜਿ ਕੁਲ ਕਾ ਕਰੇ ਉਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: aaeaa ohu paravaan hai ji kul kaa kare udhaar |
lines.english: Celebrated and approved is the coming into the world of such a person, who saves all his generations as well.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅੰਦਰਿ ਸੁਖੁ ਨ ਹੋਵਈ ਮਨਮੁਖ ਜਨਮੁ ਖੁਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: andar sukh na hovee manamukh janam khuaar |
lines.english: They do not find any peace within themselves; the self-willed manmukhs waste away their lives.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹੋਰੁ ਕੂੜੁ ਪੜਣਾ ਕੂੜੁ ਕਮਾਵਣਾ ਬਿਖਿਆ ਨਾਲਿ ਪਿਆਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: hor koorr parranaa koorr kamaavanaa bikhiaa naal piaar |
lines.english: Other study is false, and other actions are false; such people are in love with poison.

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮਿ ਰਤੇ ਸੇ ਉਬਰੇ ਗੁਰ ਕੈ ਹੇਤਿ ਅਪਾਰਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: naanak naam rate se ubare gur kai het apaar |2|
lines.english: O Nanak, those who are attuned to the Naam are saved; they have infinite love for the Guru. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਕਰਿ ਕਰਿ ਵੇਖਦਾ ਆਪੇ ਸਭੁ ਸਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: aape kar kar vekhadaa aape sabh sachaa |
lines.english: He Himself creates the creation, and gazes upon it; He Himself is totally True.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਤੁ ਭਾਵੈ ਤਿਤੁ ਲਾਇਦਾ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: jit bhaavai tith laaeidaa guramukh har sachaa |
lines.english: By the Pleasure of His Will, the True Lord joins the Gurmukh to Himself.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਨ ਬੂਝੈ ਖਸਮ ਕਾ ਸੋਈ ਨਰੁ ਕਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: jo hukam na boojhai khasam kaa soee nar kachaa |
lines.english: One who does not understand the Hukam, the Command of his Lord and Master, is false.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਉ ਨਾਨਕ ਆਪਿ ਨਚਾਇਦਾ ਤਿਵ ਹੀ ਕੋ ਨਚਾ ॥੨੨॥੧॥ ਸੁਧੁ ॥
lines.translit: jiau naanak aap nachaaeidaa tiv hee ko nachaa |22|1| sudh |
lines.english: O Nanak, as He Himself makes us dance, we dance. ||22||1|| Sudh||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਸਦਾ ਸਲਾਹੀਐ ਸਭਿ ਤਿਸ ਦੇ ਜਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh sadaa salaaheeai sabh tis de jachaa |
lines.english: The Gurmukhs praise Him forever; all are beggars of Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭਨਾ ਕਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਏਕੁ ਹੈ ਗੁਰਸਬਦੀ ਰਚਾ ॥
lines.translit: sabhanaa kaa saahib ek hai gurasabadee rachaa |
lines.english: He is the One Lord and Master of all; through the Word of the Guru's Shabad, we are blended with Him.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਾਰੂ ਵਾਰ ਮਹਲਾ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: maaroo vaar mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Vaar Of Maaroo, Fifth Mehl,

lines.gurmukhi: ੴ ਸਤਿਗੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਸਾਦਿ ॥
lines.translit: ik oankaar satigur prasaad |
lines.english: One Universal Creator God. By The Grace Of The True Guru:

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਚਉ ਸਜਣ ਮੈਡਿਆ ਡੇਈ ਸਿਸੁ ਉਤਾਰਿ ॥
lines.translit: too chau sajan maiddiaa ddeee sis utaar |
lines.english: If You tell me to, O my Friend, I will cut off my head and give it to You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੈਣ ਮਹਿੰਜੇ ਤਰਸਦੇ ਕਦਿ ਪਸੀ ਦੀਦਾਰੁ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: nain mahinje tarasade kad pasee deedaar |1|
lines.english: My eyes long for You; when will I see Your Vision? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਨੀਹੁ ਮਹਿੰਜਾ ਤਊ ਨਾਲਿ ਬਿਆ ਨੇਹ ਕੂੜਾਵੇ ਡੇਖੁ ॥
lines.translit: neehu mahinjaa taoo naal biaa neh koorraave ddekh |
lines.english: I am in love with You; I have seen that other love is false.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਪੜ ਭੋਗ ਡਰਾਵਣੇ ਜਿਚਰੁ ਪਿਰੀ ਨ ਡੇਖੁ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kaparr bhog ddaraavane jichar piree na ddekh |2|
lines.english: Even clothes and food are frightening to me, as long as I do not see my Beloved. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਉਠੀ ਝਾਲੂ ਕੰਤੜੇ ਹਉ ਪਸੀ ਤਉ ਦੀਦਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: autthee jhaaloo kantarre hau pasee tau deedaar |
lines.english: I rise early, O my Husband Lord, to behold Your Vision.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਜਲੁ ਹਾਰੁ ਤਮੋਲ ਰਸੁ ਬਿਨੁ ਪਸੇ ਹਭਿ ਰਸ ਛਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaajal haar tamol ras bin pase habh ras chhaar |3|
lines.english: Eye make-up, garlands of flowers, and the flavor of betel leaf, are all nothing but dust, without seeing You. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਆਗਿਆ ਹੋਏ ਬੇਦ ਪਾਪੁ ਪੁੰਨੁ ਵੀਚਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: har aagiaa hoe bed paap pun veechaariaa |
lines.english: By the Will of the Lord, the Vedas came into being; they discriminate between sin and virtue.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਸਚਾ ਸਾਹਿਬੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਚੁ ਸਭੁ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: too sachaa saahib sach sach sabh dhaariaa |
lines.english: You are True, O my True Lord and Master; You uphold all that is true.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਕੀਤੋ ਥਾਟੁ ਸਿਰਜਿ ਸੰਸਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: guramukh keeto thaatt siraj sansaariaa |
lines.english: You created the world, making a place for the Gurmukhs.

lines.gurmukhi: ਬ੍ਰਹਮਾ ਬਿਸਨੁ ਮਹੇਸੁ ਤ੍ਰੈ ਗੁਣ ਬਿਸਥਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: brahamaa bisan mahes trai gun bisathaariaa |
lines.english: You created Brahma, Vishnu and Shiva, and the expanse of the three qualities.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਵ ਖੰਡ ਪ੍ਰਿਥਮੀ ਸਾਜਿ ਹਰਿ ਰੰਗ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: nav khandd prithamee saaj har rang savaariaa |
lines.english: Creating the world of the nine regions, O Lord, You have embellished it with beauty.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਜਾਣਹਿ ਸਭ ਬਿਧਿ ਆਪਿ ਗੁਰਮੁਖਿ ਨਿਸਤਾਰਿਆ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: too jaaneh sabh bidh aap guramukh nisataariaa |1|
lines.english: You Yourself know all ways and means; You Yourself save the Gurmukhs. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਵੇਕੀ ਜੰਤ ਉਪਾਇ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਕਲ ਧਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: vekee jant upaae antar kal dhaariaa |
lines.english: Creating the beings of various kinds, You infused Your power into them.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਕੋਇ ਸਚੁ ਸਿਰਜਣਹਾਰਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: teraa ant na jaanai koe sach sirajanahaariaa |
lines.english: No one knows Your limit, O True Creator Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਡਖਣੇ ਮਃ ੫ ॥
lines.translit: ddakhane mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Dakhanay, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੇ ਤੂ ਮਿਤ੍ਰੁ ਅਸਾਡੜਾ ਹਿਕ ਭੋਰੀ ਨਾ ਵੇਛੋੜਿ ॥
lines.translit: je too mitru asaaddarraa hik bhoree naa vechhorr |
lines.english: If You are my friend, then don't separate Yourself from me, even for an instant.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੀਉ ਮਹਿੰਜਾ ਤਉ ਮੋਹਿਆ ਕਦਿ ਪਸੀ ਜਾਨੀ ਤੋਹਿ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: jeeo mahinjaa tau mohiaa kad pasee jaanee tohi |1|
lines.english: My soul is fascinated and enticed by You; when will I see You, O my Love? ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨ ਤੂ ਜਲੁ ਭਾਹੜੀ ਵਿਛੋੜੇ ਮਰਿ ਜਾਹਿ ॥
lines.translit: durajan too jal bhaaharree vichhorre mar jaeh |
lines.english: Burn in the fire, you evil person; O separation, be dead.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੰਤਾ ਤੂ ਸਉ ਸੇਜੜੀ ਮੈਡਾ ਹਭੋ ਦੁਖੁ ਉਲਾਹਿ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: kantaa too sau sejarree maiddaa habho dukh ulaeh |2|
lines.english: O my Husband Lord, please sleep upon my bed, that all my sufferings may be gone. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਦੁਰਜਨੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਭਾਉ ਹੈ ਵੇਛੋੜਾ ਹਉਮੈ ਰੋਗੁ ॥
lines.translit: durajan doojaa bhaau hai vechhorraa haumai rog |
lines.english: The evil person is engrossed in the love of duality; through the disease of egotism, he suffers separation.

lines.translit: mahalaa 5 |
lines.english: Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੂ ਅਗਮ ਦਇਆਲੁ ਬੇਅੰਤੁ ਤੇਰੀ ਕੀਮਤਿ ਕਹੈ ਕਉਣੁ ॥
lines.translit: too agam deaal beant teree keemat kahai kaun |
lines.english: You are inaccessible, merciful and infinite; who can estimate Your worth?

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਜਣੁ ਸਚਾ ਪਾਤਿਸਾਹੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਮਿਲਿ ਕੀਚੈ ਭੋਗੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sajan sachaa paatisaahu jis mil keechai bhog |3|
lines.english: The True Lord King is my friend; meeting with Him, I am so happy. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਪਉੜੀ ॥
lines.translit: paurree |
lines.english: Pauree:

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਸਿਰਜਿਆ ਸਭੁ ਸੰਸਾਰੁ ਤੂ ਨਾਇਕੁ ਸਗਲ ਭਉਣ ॥
lines.translit: tudh sirajiaa sabh sansaar too naaeik sagal bhaun |
lines.english: You created the entire universe; You are the Master of all the worlds.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੇਰੀ ਕੁਦਰਤਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਜਾਣੈ ਮੇਰੇ ਠਾਕੁਰ ਸਗਲ ਰਉਣ ॥
lines.translit: teree kudarat koe na jaanai mere tthaakur sagal raun |
lines.english: No one knows Your creative power, O my all-pervading Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤੁਧੁ ਅਪੜਿ ਕੋਇ ਨ ਸਕੈ ਤੂ ਅਬਿਨਾਸੀ ਜਗ ਉਧਰਣ ॥
lines.translit: tudh aparr koe na sakai too abinaasee jag udharan |
lines.english: No one can equal You; You are imperishable and eternal, the Savior of the world.
